markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to discuss Town's content strategy and growth objectives for their tax preparation service.](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Town aims to do taxes for 2,000 businesses next year, targeting $2-6M in revenue](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Main growth focus is partnerships, with direct acquisition as upside (goal: 1,000 customers)](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [Content strategy should focus on SMBs, building credibility and domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Success metrics: improved search rankings, email capture, and building a comprehensive tax library](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)

## Topics

### Company Context and Positioning

  - [Town provides tax preparation services for SMBs, focusing on businesses with $250K-$5M annual revenue](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Differentiators: Responsive CPAs + AI-powered contextual tax advice](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [Rebranding and new website launch in August](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Targeting e-commerce, startups, professional services (doctors, dentists, law firms, consultants)](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)

### Growth Strategy and Objectives

  - [2025 goal: 2,000 businesses, $2-6M revenue (up from $350-400K this year)](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=2787.0)
  - [Primary focus on partnerships, aiming to lock in 2,000 customers](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=2804.0)
  - [Direct acquisition goal: additional 1,000 customers (would be "ecstatic")](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=2875.0)
  - [Building capacity for 3,500 customers to allow for overperformance](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=3024.0)

### Content Strategy Priorities

  - [Build credibility through comprehensive, high-quality tax content](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Create a "tax library" covering 35 most important business tax topics](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
  - [Focus on SMB content strategy initially, partner content strategy later](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [Improve domain authority and search rankings for key terms](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [Explore creative, unique content ideas to stand out in the market](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)

### Customer Acquisition and Seasonality

  - [Tax season (Jan-Apr) is critical, with 80% of customers acquired then](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Current CAC in industry: $300-400](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=2912.0)
  - [CPC: $3-4 normally, jumps to $8-12 in Jan-Apr](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=2922.0)
  - [Considering monthly subscription model to build loyalty pre-tax season](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=2948.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Main competition: local CPAs (90% of market)](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=2602.0)
  - [Other players: TurboTax for Business, H\&R Block (lower-end)](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=2617.0)
  - [Emerging competitors: Fifteenth (high-end focus), Rivets Pass (offshore model)](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=2724.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel and Aida to send follow-up notes and research requests](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [Pier to review and comment on strategy document by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=3470.0)
  - [GrowthX team to propose weekly meeting cadence if needed](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=3484.0)
  - [Explore creative content ideas beyond standard industry playbook](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=3289.0)
  - [Begin developing comprehensive tax library content](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=3195.0)
  - [Investigate potential for email capture and pre-tax season engagement strategies](https://fathom.video/share/jD5ubJxGSaUFo-h_x1zqdyq9YadH8dm1?tab=summary&timestamp=3169.0)
